raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2655 seeks to make it a misdemeanor for first responders to take unauthorized pictures during an accident or crime scene.",
    "The bill proposes penalties of up to a year in jail and up to $5,000 in fines for law enforcement officials who photograph a deceased person without authorization.",
    "The legislation aims to address a deficiency in current law regarding the handling of images captured by first responders at accident scenes.",
    "The bill was introduced in response to a reported incident involving a sheriff’s deputy showing photos of a deceased person to others in a bar.",
    "The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department sponsored AB 2655."
  ]
}
```
